title: Peaceful Purple Jamaican Broccoli Tagine
description: A cultured and tender Jamaican dish featuring purple sprouting broccoli, this recipe is perfect for a lazy Sunday, and it is nut free friendly. The agemono deep fry method adds a nice crunch to the dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in the ceramic tagine over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped scotch bonnet pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add the purple sprouting broccoli florets and cook until they are tender.
Add the thyme, allspice, salt, and black pepper and stir to combine.
Cover the tagine and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the broccoli is tender.
Remove the tagine from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
